reviews.review_text: We eat here I feel every other week. And have never had one disappointing meal. We usually do take out but service has always been great inside.

One thing I appreciate about Los Tres Amigos is its consistency. You are always going to get good food and great and quick service. It's a great place to take your family (they're great with kids!), your date, or eat by yourself.
Great food,

Ordered nachos.  Eventually discovered nearly 1/2 inch of water in the bottom of the plate.  Chips at the bottom were completely water logged.  I asked the waiter about it.  He indifferently replied this was normal... with a straight face.  My companion's dinner was not as bad, but neither of us would ever go there again.

Service and atmosphere was great and waiting for seating. Food portions were on the small side for the price. several of us had room temp to slightly warm sides. (Rice and beans). Maybe they had an off day?
Over priced food, no bueno.

Food was served quickly and hot. Our server I think went on a half hour break and forgot to tell us. We got our drinks about 10 minutes after we ordered them, and then we were totally forgotten about. Finally, I flagged a manager down who took our order. Server finally reappeared after that. My husband asked for more chips and another beer, which he never got. I think we would rather keep going to the Holt location.
